report: 组织可见神经纤维背景中散在或片状分布的肿瘤细胞，大部分为成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞，可见神经毡。神经纤维面积<50%，核分裂像偶见。
report_ch: 神经纤维背景中散在或片状分布的肿瘤细胞，神经毡。神经纤维面积<50%，核分裂像偶见。
report_en: Tumor cells are scattered or distributed in patches within the neurofibrillary background, with neuropil present. The area of neurofibrillary tissue is <50%, and occasional mitotic figures are observed.

report: 组织显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。局灶可见菊形团及神经原纤维。可见神经纤维。可见核分裂，低MKI指数。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。局灶可见菊形团及神经原纤维。可见核分裂。
report_en: Numerous small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei with absent or scant cytoplasm. Focal rosette formations and neurofibrils are observed. Mitotic figures are present.

report: 组织可见骨小梁间异型细胞弥漫或小片状分布，瘤细胞胞浆稀少，形态异型，可见病理核分裂。另见组织显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。病理性核分裂易见，高MKI指数。未见明确神经原纤维。
report_ch: 骨小梁间异型细胞弥漫或小片状分布，瘤细胞胞浆稀少，形态异型，可见病理核分裂。另见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，病理性核分裂易见。
report_en: Between the bone trabeculae, atypical cells are diffusely or in small clusters. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm, atypical morphology, and pathological mitoses are visible. Additionally, a large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with hyperchromatic nuclei, absent or scant cytoplasm, and pathological mitoses are easily observed.

report:
肿瘤：所送组织可见多灶坏死、出血，约占切片面积70-80%，散在含铁血黄素沉积。局部见少量小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。局灶可见神经原纤维。肿瘤边缘可见少许肾上腺组织。肿瘤周围淋巴结可见肿瘤转移（约为3/3）。脉管内见肿瘤细胞。
腹主A旁淋巴结：所送淋巴结组织可见坏死、出血，结构欠清，部分结节似有融合，淋巴结内见肿瘤转移（约为6/8）。
肾周脂肪：所送脂肪及血管组织充血、出血，局部坏死，含铁血黄素沉积，散在急慢性炎症细胞浸润，泡沫细胞形成，坏死灶中未见明确肿瘤组织。
瘤旁：所送少许纤维脂肪、神经及血管组织，热反应重，部分挤压变形，未见明确肿瘤组织。
肠系膜淋巴结：送检淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织（0/1）。
肠系膜上A旁淋巴结：送检淋巴结见肿瘤转移（1/1）。
淋巴组织：送检淋巴结见肿瘤转移（约为8/17），纤维脂肪组织中见少许神经组织。
-1号片
report_ch: 肿瘤组织多灶坏死出血，含少量小圆形肿瘤细胞，核浓染，胞浆稀少。肿瘤边缘见肾上腺组织。肿瘤周围淋巴结转移（3/3），脉管内见肿瘤细胞。腹主A旁淋巴结转移（6/8）。肠系膜上A旁淋巴结转移（1/1）。淋巴组织转移（8/17）。肾周脂肪、瘤旁及肠系膜淋巴结未见肿瘤。
report_en: The tumor tissue exhibits multifocal necrosis and hemorrhage, containing a small number of small round tumor cells with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. Adrenal tissue is observed at the tumor margin. Lymph node metastasis is present around the tumor (3/3), and tumor cells are seen within the vascular spaces. Metastasis is noted in the para-aortic lymph nodes (6/8) and the lymph nodes adjacent to the superior mesenteric artery (1/1). Lymphatic tissue metastasis is observed (8/17). No tumor is found in the perirenal fat, adjacent to the tumor, or in the mesenteric lymph nodes.

report_ch: 肿瘤：神经纤维丰富，占肿瘤组织面积>50%。瘤旁、血管旁脂肪及淋巴结均未见明确肿瘤组织。
report_en: Tumor: Rich in nerve fibers, accounting for >50% of the tumor tissue area. No definite tumor tissue is observed in the peritumoral area, perivascular fat, or lymph nodes.

report: 肿瘤组织显示小圆形肿瘤细胞呈弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆少，核浓染。神经纤维稀少。可见神经毡及核分裂像。MKI指数约1-2%。脉管内可见瘤栓。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织显示小圆形肿瘤细胞呈弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆少，核浓染。脉管内可见瘤栓。
report_en: The tumor tissue shows a diffuse distribution of small round tumor cells. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Tumor emboli are visible within the vessels.

report: 组织显示神经纤维背景（神经纤维所占面积>90%）中可见散在或灶性分布的神经节细胞。神经节细胞成熟或欠成熟。未见核分裂像及核碎裂。未见神经毡及菊形团。

report_en: No mitotic figures or nuclear fragmentation are seen in the neurofibrillary background. No neuropil or rosettes are observed.

report_en: Extensive hemorrhage and necrosis with hemosiderin deposition are observed in the tumor tissue, with the hemorrhagic and necrotic areas accounting for approximately >90% of the section area. A small amount of liver tissue is visible within the necrotic tissue. A small amount of adrenal tissue is seen at the tumor margin. No definite tumor tissue is identified in the adjacent tissue. Small foci of tumor cells are found in the para-aortic submitted tissue.

report:

肾周脂肪：送检脂肪、纤维及血管组织，小灶坏死，未见明确存活肿瘤组织。

report_ch: 左侧腹膜后肿瘤：肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，核浓染，胞浆稀少。多灶坏死出血，含铁血黄素沉积，坏死出血区占切片面积约60-70%。肿瘤边缘见少许肾上腺组织。肾周脂肪：未见明确存活肿瘤组织。瘤旁1：可见肿瘤组织。瘤旁2：未见明确存活肿瘤组织。
report_en: Left retroperitoneal tumor: The tumor tissue is rich in small round tumor cells with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. There are multifocal necrosis and hemorrhage with hemosiderin deposition, with necrotic and hemorrhagic areas accounting for approximately 60-70% of the section area. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed at the tumor margin. Perirenal fat: No definite viable tumor tissue is identified. Paratumor 1: Tumor tissue is visible. Paratumor 2: No definite viable tumor tissue is identified.

report: 肿瘤组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。可见神经原纤维及菊形团。神经纤维稀少，占肿瘤组织面积<10%。MKI指数约2-3%。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。
report_en: The tumor tissue shows a diffuse distribution of numerous small round tumor cells. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm and abundant nuclear chromatin.

report: “肿瘤”组织显示为纤维脂肪组织，未见肿瘤组织。

report_en: The tumor tissue appears as fibroadipose tissue, with no tumor tissue observed.

report: 组织显示神经纤维背景（所占面积>50%）中散在或灶性分布的成熟和欠成熟的神经节细胞。未见神经母细胞。未见神经毡及菊形团结构。MKI指数<1%。肿瘤周围软组织中纤维组织增生，伴灶性黏液变。
report_ch: 神经纤维背景中散在或灶性分布的成熟和欠成熟细胞。肿瘤周围软组织中纤维组织增生，伴灶性黏液变。
report_en: The neurofibrillary background shows scattered or focal distribution of mature and immature cells. There is fibrous tissue proliferation in the peritumoral soft tissue, accompanied by focal mucinous changes.

report:
组织”显示灶性坏死伴纤维组织增生、玻变，占肿瘤组织面积约40%。肿瘤细胞小到中等体积大小，类圆形，部分可见伊红色胞浆，核仁不明显。神经毡结构多见。神经纤维少，占肿瘤组织面积<5%。多见钙化及淋巴滤泡形成。脉管内可见瘤栓。另见少量神经节结构。
“腔静脉旁”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（3/3）。
“腹主动脉旁淋巴结”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（2/2）。
“胰腺淋巴结”显示部分淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（4/5）。
“左髂血管旁淋巴结”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（14/14）。
“右肾动脉”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（1/1）。
“肝门淋巴结”显示部分淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（5/7）。
“肠系膜淋巴结”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（2/2）。
“右肾门”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（11/11）。软组织中可见肿瘤组织。
“肠系膜下动脉旁淋巴结”显示淋巴结结构破坏，肿瘤组织转移（3/3）。
“精索静脉旁淋巴结”显示软组织中纤维组织增生，可见肿瘤组织转移。
“瘤旁”显示软组织中可见较多肿瘤组织。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织灶性坏死伴纤维组织增生、玻变，占40%。肿瘤细胞小到中等体积，类圆形，部分胞浆伊红，核仁不明显。脉管内可见瘤栓。多处淋巴结结构破坏伴肿瘤转移，包括腔静脉旁、腹主动脉旁、胰腺、左髂血管旁、右肾动脉、肝门、肠系膜、右肾门、肠系膜下动脉旁及精索静脉旁淋巴结。软组织中可见肿瘤组织。
report_en: Focal necrosis of tumor tissue accompanied by fibrosis and hyaline degeneration, accounting for 40%. The tumor cells are small to medium in size, roundish, with some eosinophilic cytoplasm and inconspicuous nucleoli. Tumor emboli are observed within the vessels. Multiple lymph nodes show structural destruction with tumor metastasis, including those adjacent to the vena cava, abdominal aorta, pancreas, left iliac vessels, right renal artery, hepatic portal, mesentery, right renal hilum, inferior mesenteric artery, and spermatic vein. Tumor tissue is identified within the soft tissue.

report:
淋巴结局部烧灼挤压变形，未见明确肿瘤组织（约为0/7）。
4区：送检淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织（约为0/4）。
5区：送检淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织（约为0/4）。
7区：送检淋巴结见肿瘤转移（4/6）。
纵膈淋巴结：送检淋巴结见肿瘤转移（6/6）伴化疗后反应。脉管内见肿瘤细胞。
肺门淋巴结：送检淋巴结局部烧灼挤压变形，未见明确肿瘤组织（约为0/4）。
气管隆凸旁：送检淋巴结见肿瘤转移（1/1）。
胸腺：送检胸腺组织充血水肿出血，局灶钙化，未见明确肿瘤组织。
纵膈肿瘤：所送组织可见多灶坏死、出血，约占切片面积80-90%。局部见少量小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。局灶可见神经原纤维。
report_ch: 淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织（0/7）。4区、5区、肺门淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织。7区淋巴结见肿瘤转移（4/6）。纵膈淋巴结见肿瘤转移（6/6）伴化疗后反应，脉管内见肿瘤细胞。气管隆凸旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（1/1）。胸腺组织未见明确肿瘤组织。纵膈肿瘤组织多灶坏死、出血，局部见少量小圆形肿瘤细胞。
report_en: No definite tumor tissue is identified in the lymph nodes (0/7). No definite tumor tissue is found in the lymph nodes of zones 4, 5, and the hilum. Tumor metastasis is observed in the lymph nodes of zone 7 (4/6). Tumor metastasis is seen in the mediastinal lymph nodes (6/6) with post-chemotherapy response, and tumor cells are present within the vessels. Tumor metastasis is identified in the paratracheal lymph nodes (1/1). No definite tumor tissue is observed in the thymic tissue. Multiple foci of necrosis and hemorrhage are noted in the mediastinal tumor tissue, with a small number of small round tumor cells seen locally.

report: 示丰富的神经纤维背景，占肿瘤组织面积>50%。其间可见灶性或散在分布的节细胞。大部分节细胞分化成熟。可见多个小灶节细胞体积较小，未见卫星细胞，欠成熟。未见神经毡及神经母细胞成分。未见核分裂像。MKI指数<1%。其间可见肾上腺组织，部分肾上腺组织陷入肿瘤组织。切缘显示肿瘤组织表面可见菲薄的纤维或脂肪组织。

The margins show thin fibrous or adipose tissue on the surface of the tumor tissue.

report_en: Scattered nodules of varying sizes are observed within the neurofiber background. The nodules contain patchy distributions of small round tumor cells, which exhibit significant atypia, enlarged hyperchromatic nuclei, and visible pathological mitoses. Neurofibrils are also observed. Multiple foci of necrosis and calcification are present. No tumor tissue is identified in the perirenal adipose tissue. Tumor metastases are found in the para-aortic lymph nodes (10/10), renal hilar lymph nodes (4/5), and superior mesenteric artery lymph nodes (2/2). No tumor metastases are detected in the left iliac vascular lymph nodes and inferior mesenteric lymph nodes (0/3).

A small focus of tumor tissue metastasis is identified in the para-tumor area 2.

report_en: The tissue shows extensive necrosis and calcification, fibrous tissue hyperplasia, and multifocal foam cell formation. A small number of small round tumor cells are observed locally, with scant cytoplasm, abundant nuclear chromatin, and cellular atypia. No mitotic figures are seen, and the tumor cells occupy <5% of the tissue area. Perirenal adipose tissue exhibits vascular congestion and dilation, with focal fibrous tissue hyperplasia and no tumor involvement. The superior mesenteric lymph nodes show necrosis and calcification, with no residual tumor cells. The renal hilar lymph nodes exhibit extensive necrosis and calcification, with no residual tumor tissue. The adjacent submitted tissue consists of fibrofatty and neural tissue, with no tumor cell involvement. No residual or metastatic tumor tissue is observed in the submitted tissues from the celiac trunk, para-aortic area, pancreatic head, right renal artery, inferior vena cava, and adrenal region.

report_en: Small round tumor cells adjacent to adrenal tissue are arranged in sheets. Nerve fibers are sparse. Rosette-like structures and neuropil are commonly observed. Calcification is present.

report:
组织显示神经纤维背景（所占面积>99%）中散在或灶性分布成熟和即将成熟的神经节细胞，局部几小灶神经毡中见小簇神经母细胞。MKI指数低。另见几小灶钙化。局部边缘见肿瘤浸润周围纤维脂肪组织，邻近淋巴结可疑肿瘤转移伴灶性钙化（2/2）。
-14
report_ch: 神经纤维背景中散在分布成熟神经节细胞，局部见钙化灶。肿瘤浸润周围纤维脂肪组织，邻近淋巴结见肿瘤转移伴钙化。
report_en: Scattered mature ganglion cells are present within the neurofibrous background, with focal calcifications observed. The tumor infiltrates the surrounding fibroadipose tissue, and tumor metastasis with calcification is noted in adjacent lymph nodes.
